sglang.title: Adds support for OpenAI chat completions API in bench_serving
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications
Implements a new function async_request_openai_chat_completions to support benchmarking OpenAI's chat completions API.
This includes handling both streaming and non-streaming responses, image data within messages, and adapting to the chat API's specific response format.
Als

sglang.title: [bugfix] Remove PR comment posting from Rust benchmark workflow
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR removes the "Post benchmark results as PR comment" step from the Rust benchmark workflow to fix permission issues with pull requests from forked repositories.
The step would fail when PRs come from forks because GitHub restricts GITHUB_TOKEN permissions for security reasons, preve

vllm.title: [Frontend] Generalize `v1/audio/transcriptions` endpoint
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Anticipating more models like Gemma3n with audio as input, this PR attempts to make the transcription endpoint a bit more general whle moving some of the whisper specifics into SupportsTranscription.
It's the first step in opening up v1/audio/transcriptions to models other than whisper, while untang

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Correct behavior of GraniteMoeHybrid for TensorParallel execution
vllm.author: s3woz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose


We noticed that GraniteMoeHybrid produces wrong outputs when executed in TensorParallel mode. This bugfix changes the attention implementation to a correct TensorParallel version which avoids discrepancies at the outputs and passes the tests/models/language/generation/test_hybrid.py::test_

vllm.title: [CI Fix] Try fixing eagle e2e test OOM by reducing block allocation
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
FIX #20214
The constantly failing test in CI seems to be an OOM during kv cache allocation, so maybe we can get through by just manually specifying the kv cache blocks for now. I'm not sure if it is a memory profiling issue or just a small GPU issue since the tests have failed for weeks at t
